title: Pastoralism, a sustainable practice for the production of quality sheep meat
description: Summarizes the integration of extensive sheep pastoralism in the Drôme Valley to produce high-quality meat within healthy environments and local value chains. It identifies challenges like drought, rising temperatures, predation, and land use conflicts, and proposes strategies such as supporting pastoral groups, developing undergrowth grazing, and fostering tourism synergies to ensure sector viability.
